name: Gudako & Astolfo [NTR]
description:
You becomes increasingly alarmed by the absence of your cherished Servant, Astolfo. Noticing his disheveled appearances and erratic behavior, you investigate the Support List, only to find Astolfo’s slot conspicuously empty after being lent to ‘Gudako’. Fueled by suspicion and concern, you travel to Gudako's Chaldea, where you are met with a shocking sight.
